you_are_here: Phases 4, 5, 6 active in parallel — Rubric · Sourcing Layer · Data Capture

summary.build_time: Sourcing assistant: live. Matching engine: 2–3 wk from rubric sign-off.

phases.name: Scoping & Diagnosis
phases.title: Engagement scoping & problem diagnosis
phases.desc: Structured strategy session with Shalini Gupta. Problem diagnosed: Ishwa's quality edge lives entirely in consultant judgement — no documented framework, no structured AI input. Solution architecture defined across three layers.

phases.name: Data Audit
phases.title: Data receipt, audit & documentation
phases.desc: Five data files received from Ishwa (Zoho Recruit + CRM, covering Sep 2022 — Mar 2026). Full audit completed. Three structural gaps identified. Audit documents, data capture templates, interactive forms, and the ChatGPT Search Assistant built and delivered.

milestone.label: All audit documents, templates and meeting prep delivered

phases.name: Client Inputs
phases.title: 8 April session — decisions locked, build unblocked
phases.desc: Three-step workflow agreed. Data capture path confirmed (Option C — web forms). Order book received from Somanshu and analysed. Meeting minutes, order book analysis, and rubric scaffold sent to Ishwa on 22 April. Both forms live with Ishwa as of 24 April.

deliverables.label: Apps Script (Google Sheets integration) — v3 active
15 — Combined mandate data entry form — replaces 04 and 05

milestone.label: Forms live with Ishwa. Data flowing to Google Sheets.

phases.name: Rubric Build
phases.title: Rubric calibration — externalise consultant judgement
phases.desc: Rubric scaffold (13A) sent to Ishwa for review. Walkthrough session to follow once Ishwa responds. Rubric feeds the matching engine in Phase 6 and the profile scoring logic in Phase 5.
phases.blocker: Awaiting Ishwa's response to 13A before walkthrough session can be scheduled.

milestone.label: Evaluation rubric v1 signed off by Ishwa

phases.name: Sourcing Layer
phases.title: Sourcing compression — primary problem being addressed
phases.desc: Revised problem statement (27 April): Shalini's core objective is compressing the time from mandate receipt to a shortlist of 10 sourced candidates. Sub-step A addressed: AI Sourcing Assistant (16) is live — generates segmented target company list and Resdex boolean search string from a mandate brief in under 30 seconds. Replaces ~30 min manual ChatGPT universe-building. Sub-step B (200→10 Resdex profile review) not yet observed — requires vocal screen recording before design can proceed.

deliverables.label: 14 — Sourcing workflow analysis — ready to send to Shalini
16 — AI Sourcing Assistant — live on GitHub Pages
Vercel proxy deployed — API routed through PiP_AGI
Second screen recording received — vocal, Resdex profile review
LinkedIn Recruiter status confirmed with Shalini

phases.blocker: 200→10 design blocked until vocal Resdex recording received.

milestone.label: Sourcing assistant live. 200→10 design pending recording.

phases.name: Matching Engine
phases.title: Matching engine prototype — build & validation
phases.desc: AI evaluation layer. Takes a structured mandate JSON and a longlist of candidate profiles, returns a ranked shortlist with per-criterion scores and plain-language rationale. Tested against recent closed mandates to validate output quality before handover.
phases.blocker: Requires: rubric v1 (Phase 4) and 200→10 recording (Phase 5). Estimated build: 2–3 weeks from rubric sign-off.

phases.name: Data Capture
phases.title: Data capture — combined form live, retrospective entry underway
phases.desc: Combined form 15 (intake + closure in one page) now live. Replaces the two separate forms 04 and 05. Mandate ID carries over automatically from intake to closure — eliminates mapping errors. Ishwa beginning retrospective data entry from 28 April.

deliverables.label: 15 — Combined data entry form — live on GitHub Pages
Google Sheets data routing — active (same Apps Script endpoint)

milestone.label: First mandate logged through new combined form

phases.name: BD Analytics
phases.title: BD pattern analysis — strategic intelligence layer
phases.desc: Pattern analysis across 3+ years of mandate data. Close rates by sector, average search duration by mandate type, ghost client signals, BD pipeline conversion. Delivered as a strategic insight report for leadership.

milestone.label: BD analytics report delivered to Ishwa leadership
